message:
fix(tests): update truncation test expectations for partial-line and empty-line behavior

- truncate_head_first_line_exceeds_byte_limit: Update assertion from
  empty content to partial line ("x" * 400 bytes), output_lines from
  0 to 1, output_bytes from 0 to 400 — matching the corrected
  truncation behavior that now returns partial content up to the byte
  limit instead of discarding the entire first line.
- truncate_head_empty_lines: Assert content is "\n\n\n" (3 empty lines)
  and split yields 4 items (split on 3 newlines), replacing the
  imprecise "at most 3 lines" check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
